texto: The test of our progress is not whether we add more to the abundance of those who have much
autor: it is whether we provide enough for those who have too little.
explicacao: Citação de it is whether we provide enough for those who have too little. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “The test of our progress is not whether we add more to the abundance of those who have much” articula reflexao, franklin-d-roosevelt, progress em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
